svg.text: • DA, ID3, aFRR energy and capacity prices
• Gas price, ETES parameters, boiler efficiency
• ETES charging and storage headroom check
• Buy electricity if DA is below benchmark
• Buy extra when ID3 is cheap
• Sell/reduce DA when ID3 is expensive
• Final ETES charge, discharge and SoC
• Gas boiler heat production and heat coverage
• DA cost, IDC cashflow, aFRR energy cost
• aFRR capacity revenue and net operating cost
